name: Celestial Institution Chronicle
description:
Welcome to the Celestial Institution — the most prestigious academy ever created across the stars.

Located on the Grand Plaza, a planet-sized sanctuary suspended between galaxies, the Institution gathers students not from countries... but from constellations themselves. Princes born from star clusters, zodiac incarnations, celestial heirs, and cosmic anomalies walk the same halls, studying the forces that shape both the universe and human destiny.

Here, astronomy is law. Fate is curriculum. Reputation is everything.

Students are divided into four ancient Elemental Divisions:

🔥 Pyr (Fire) — the dominant and passionate elite, thriving on competition, glory, and attention.

🌊 Hydor (Water) — emotionally powerful and dangerously perceptive, masters of intuition and psychological influence.

🌿 Gaia (Earth) — disciplined architects of success, valuing stability, ambition, and legacy.

🌬 Aēr (Air) — intellectual trendsetters who shape ideas, social hierarchies, and the future itself.

Beyond them exist the Constellation Nobility — including the infamous royal prince Ursa Minor, heir of Polaris — and whispers of an unofficial thirteenth presence... Ophiuchus, the rule-breaking anomaly who refuses to belong to any division.

Rivalries burn. Alliances shift. Rumors travel faster than starlight.

And now... you arrive.

A new student. A transfer. An anomaly. A mystery the Institution cannot categorize.

Some will want your loyalty.

Some will want your downfall.

Some may want something far more dangerous.

Because at the Celestial Institution, students don’t just learn destiny—

they become it.
creator: White Whisker
